Ad:
Democrat Party Sold Direct on eBay - Fantastic Prices on Democrat Party.
Check Out Democrat Party on eBay. Fill Your Cart With Color Today!
www.ebay.com

Is there grammatical or nonsensical issue in the ad?

Yes
No
These guidelines contain confidential and proprietary information belonging to Microsoft Corporation. The recipient understands and agrees that these materials and the information contained herein may not be used or disclosed without the prior written consent of Microsoft Corporation.

 

Overview

You will review ads (title and description) to detect grammatical and nonsensical issues. For more context, you can click on the ad title and review the landing page.  


You will first answer the question "Is there grammatical or nonsensical issue in the ad?". Please choose either Yes or No.

If you chose "Yes", please further select a category for the issue.
If you chose "Yes", please highlight (click and drag) the entire sentence with issues.

 

Category Options:
1. Grammatical

Ad Examples

Reason

Extraordinary Flavor's - Best Price's Free Shipping over $50

Apostrophe: Flavor's -> Flavors, Price's -> Prices

clorox. wipes at Amazon

Wrong position of punctuation: clorox. -> clorox

Prescriptives™ Official Prescriptives™ Official

Repetition

Medical Care from your family pets.

Preposition: From -> For

Impress Your Family With Hour Macaroni Salad Recipe!

Homophone: Hour -> Our

See Why We Is Rated #1 In Louisville!

Subject-verb mismatch: Is -> Are

 

1.A Exception: sentences ending with multiple punctuations are not considered as grammatical error. .

Examples:  
Contact us for a free quote..  
Get A Quote Today!.  

2. Nonsensical

Ad Examples

Reason

Elizabeth Warren on Amazon - Low Priced Elizabeth Warren

It does not make sense to say a person is low priced.

Buy Republican Party at eBay

We cannot buy a party. It needs to be a product like Republican Party Shirts.

10 Best Judy Danforth Online

The person name should be replaced by a product or service name.

Guideline

Yes, there is a grammatical issue in the ad.

Category: Punctuation

Ad: Democrat Party Sold Direct on eBay - Fantastic Prices on Democrat Party. Check Out Democrat Party on eBay. Fill Your Cart With Color Today!

The full stop after "Party" should be removed to avoid an abrupt end to the sentence. 

Corrected ad: Democrat Party Sold Direct on eBay - Fantastic Prices on Democrat Party. Check Out Democrat Party on eBay. Fill Your Cart With Color Today!

If you chose "Yes" please choose one of the following categories.

Grammatical
Nonsensical
I apologize, I forgot the first step. Could you please provide an ad for me to review?

Overview

You will review ads (title and description) to detect grammatical and nonsensical issues. For more context, you can click on the ad title and review the landing page.  


You will first answer the question "Is there grammatical or nonsensical issue in the ad?". Please choose either Yes or No.

If you chose "Yes", please further select a category for the issue.
If you chose "Yes", please highlight (click and drag) the entire sentence with issues.

 

Category Options:
1. Grammatical

Ad Examples

Reason

Extraordinary Flavor's - Best Price's Free Shipping over $50

Apostrophe: Flavor's -> Flavors, Price's -> Prices

clorox. wipes at Amazon

Wrong position of punctuation: clorox. -> clorox

Prescriptives™ Official Prescriptives™ Official

Repetition

Medical Care from your family pets.

Preposition: From -> For

Impress Your Family With Hour Macaroni Salad Recipe!

Homophone: Hour -> Our

See Why We Is Rated #1 In Louisville!

Examples:

Get A Quote Today!.  

2. Nonsensical

Ad Examples

Reason

Elizabeth Warren on Amazon - Low Priced Elizabeth Warren

It does not make sense to say a person is low priced.

Buy Republican Party at eBay

We cannot buy a party. It needs to be a product like Republican Party Shirts.

10 Best Judy Danforth Online

The person name should be replaced by a product or service name.

Guideline

Yes, there is a grammatical issue in the ad.

Category: Punctuation

In the first sentence, there should not be a full stop after "Party" as it creates an incomplete sentence.
